Napoleon (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $61,524,375Details
International Box Office $156,392,781
Worldwide Box Office $217,917,156
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Napoleon Bonaparte’s relentless journey to power through the prism of his addictive, volatile relationship with his one true love, Josephine, showcasing his visionary military and political tactics.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,638,887 (33.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.98 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:28.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,500 opening theaters/3,500 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $67,225,235

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 22nd, 2023 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
November 22nd, 2023 (IMAX) by Sony Pictures

November 22nd, 2023 (Wide) (Saudi Arabia)
November 22nd, 2023 (Wide) (Poland)
Video Release: January 9th, 2024 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence, some grisly images, sexual content and brief language.
(Rating bulletin 2773 (cert #54204), 3/8/2023)
R for strong violence, grisly images, sexual content, some nudity and language.
(Rating bulletin 2842 (cert #55041) (The Director's Cut), 7/10/2024)
Running Time: 158 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Recut
